positive: Minimalist cosmic fox silhouette, stylized vector art, deep space nebula backdrop of violet and cyan hues, surrounded by scattered geometric constellations and glowing neon wireframe stars. The fox is seated in a regal, alert posture, looking directly at the viewer. Extremely high contrast, flat design aesthetic, strong graphic shapes, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Studio lighting, clean outlines, isolated on a slightly textured black canvas.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, blurry, noise, jpeg artifacts, low detail, photographic, realism, grayscale
